creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Oclair from comment #1)

> install: /usr/local/share/texmf-dist/web2c/texmf.cnf: No such file or directory
The file texmf.cnf should have been installed by devel/tex-kpathsea, which is a dependency of print/texlive-tlmgr. Could you please double check, if the installation of devel/tex-kpathsea is complete.
